title: hieracium cruentiferum
intro: Hieracium cruentiferum, also known as the bloody hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium cruentiferum is typically used as a tincture, tea, or salve, and its roots and leaves are often dried and used in infusions.
